ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 90 - The AI correctly noted that the customer name is missing, which violates the rule "Invoice in the name of the Employer (wherever possible) - the name of the employer is the name of local entity of GoGlobal that employs the worker." This is correctly identified as an issue for compliance.

ISSUE_5_VALIDATION_SCORE: 95 - The AI correctly identified that line items are missing, which violates the requirement that "Expense type or description of goods/services must be visible on receipt." For a meals receipt, details of what was purchased should be present.
